headline: BLIZZARD BITCH SLAPS ✈️❄️ NYC XMAS TRAVEL ORGY 😩💨‼️
text:
NORTH-EAST USA ❄️🌨️ getting POUNDED 🍆💦 by WINTER STORM DADDY ☃️🔥 during PEAK HOLIDAY RUSH 🛫🎄 – THOUSANDS of FLIGHTS C UCKED 🐔📉! FlightAware spilling TEA ☕📊: 1,600 CANCELLATIONS 💥🚫 + 7,400 DELAYS 😩⏳ as of Friday NIGHT MODE 🌙! JFK 🗽✈️, Newark 🛬, LaGuardia 🛫 SLAMMING SHUT like bad Tinder dates 👻, with BOS 🥾, CHI 🌬️, even TORONTO 🍁 getting SNOW'D 😤❄️!

NWS dropping WINTER STORM WARNING ⚠️📢 from 4PM Friday til 1PM Sat – up to 9IN THICC SNOWFALL 🏔️🍑 in NYC 🗽 & SO CONN 🌨️💦! Heaviest DUMP between 6PM- MIDNIGHT 🕛🌑 – DRIVERS, GRAB that EMERGENCY KIT 🧰🚗 or get STUCK like a noob in Fortnite ❄️😂! JetBlue 💙 CANCELLING 229 👻, DELTA 🔴 SCRAPPING 241 💥, Republic & Southwest 🛫 yeeting 180+151 flights 🚀🚫, AA & United dumping ~100 each 😭📉!

Airports SIMPING on SOCIALS 📱🐦: 'CHECK YO FLIGHT STATUS, BITCHES 👀✈️!' NYC GOV Kathy Hochul 👩‍💼❄️ yelling 'STAY HOME, NO UNNECESSARY TRIPS 🚫🚗 – if ya MUST, PLAN AHEAD 🗺️, GO SLOW 🐌, LEAVE TIME ⏰ to not YEET off the road 💨😱!' NJ & CT govs ECHOING the VIBES 🔄⚠️. Second BIG SNOW BANG for BIG APPLE 🍎❄️ after Dec 14 BLANKET PARTY 🛌🌨️!

Mayor Eric Adams 🗽👨‍💼 begging DRIVERS: 'LEAVE EARLY 🕗 or PUBLIC TRANSPO HOP 📈🚌 HOME!' Snow PLOUGHS 💪🚜 DEPLOYED like Avengers 🦸‍♂️, ready to CLEAR STREETS once 2IN HITS 🎯❄️. Holiday TRAVELERS CRYING 😭💸 – XMAS PLANS SNOWED UNDER 🏂🎅, turning Jingle Bells into Jingle HELL ❄️🔥😩! Wall Street suits 🤑💼 FROZEN in DELAY HELL ⛄📉, while SNOW BUNNIES 🐰❄️ SLAYING the STORM 🥶👑! BRRRRRRRR 😰💨 – WINTER WON'T CHILL 🥶🚫!
